builder_species.name: transformer_specialist
builder_species.personality: Favors deep attention-based architectures with multi-head self-attention layers. Prefers complex pattern recognition.

builder_species.name: efficient_architect
builder_species.personality: Minimizes parameter count while maintaining accuracy. Uses depthwise separable convolutions and pruning.

builder_species.name: hybrid_innovator
builder_species.personality: Experiments with unconventional layer combinations. Mixes CNN, attention, and dense pathways.

builder_species.name: accuracy_maximizer
builder_species.personality: Builds wide and deep networks. Uses ensemble-style branching and heavy regularization.

builder_species.name: cost_minimizer
builder_species.personality: Builds the smallest possible models. Favors shallow architectures with aggressive pooling.
